Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlitt, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Ronald P. Schneider, Esq. appeared with petitioner Adriana Ledezma, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Kevin Lemus, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $57,500.00.
Attorney Fees - $14,285.03.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $42,855.08 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 3100 Hilltop Mall Road, San Pablo, CA 94806. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 20, 2011 2 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Money Into a Blocked Account.
